item.title: This Irish woman returned to Ireland to talk about how surprised she was that she could ever be a victim of the very violence th...

item.title: Nationalism is not just thinking that people around you should be OK
item.description:
Nationalism is not just thinking that people around you should be OK. It is prioritising a particular political projects aims and goals over human beings rights #greenscreenvideo
